name: Final end-to-end serial spine
scope: Acceptance evidence template for the integrated real pipeline.
required_proof: Real Bluesky post fetch is active in POST /api/explain.
Real Search/RAG returns cited Evidence objects and retrieval diagnostics.
Real DSPy workflow produces and validates the explanation.
Trust and fallback behavior is computed from evidence, validation, and guardrail signals.
Every factual bullet has source ids that exist in sources.
Trace includes retrieval, guardrail, trust, fallback, and adapter diagnostics.
Temporary dev adapters are absent or explicitly trace-marked as non-final.
Targeted real-service smokes complete with runtime-only keys.
commands_to_record: cd backend && uv run python -m app.eval.runner --mode api --judge deterministic
